message:
feat(compression): add zstd byte-level compression wrapper with dictionary support (ft-2oph2)

Zstd-based ByteCompressor with configurable compression levels (Fast/Default/
High/Maximum), optional dictionary training from terminal output seeds, batch
multi-buffer compression, and size-prefix mode. 20 unit tests + 11 proptests
+ 5 Criterion benchmark groups covering throughput, payload types, and
dictionary comparison.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -336,6 +336,10 @@ harness = false
 name = "frankensearch_bench"
 harness = false
 
+[[bench]]
+name = "byte_compression"
+harness = false
+
 [[test]]
 name = "proptest_daemon"
 path = "tests/proptest_daemon.rs"
